name: Zesty Broiled Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons chopped fresh rosemary, or 1/2 teaspoon dried rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Line a broiler pan with foil.
3. Arrange the chicken quarters on the prepared pan, bone side up.
4. Sprinkle the chicken with lemon juice, chopped rosemary, black pepper, and garlic.
5. Broil the chicken 6 inches from the heat until lightly browned, about 10 to 15 minutes.
6. Turn the chicken over.
7. Continue broiling until the meat is lightly browned and juices run clear when pierced with a knife, about 15 to 20 minutes total.
8. Remove the pan from the oven.
9. Coat the chicken evenly with mustard.
10. Return the chicken to the broiler and cook until golden brown, about 2 minutes.
11. Place the chicken on a serving platter.
12. Garnish with lemon wedges and rosemary sprigs.
